parsed.production_notes: The video features a human actor recorded in a real environment, but the tablet displays an AI-generated 3D avatar. The avatar's voice is also AI-generated, creating a mixed-media production.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, light brown complexion. She has dark hair tied back with loose strands framing her face. Her facial features are expressive and natural.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey long-sleeved button-up shirt with white stitching details.

characters.appearance: Young female appearance, pale complexion. She has bright red, wavy shoulder-length hair and large, animated eyes.

scenes.setting: Dimly lit room with blue ambient lighting. A desk with a cutting board, an apple, a knife, and a tablet.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits at a desk in a room illuminated by cool blue ambient light. She is slicing an apple on a dark cutting board with a knife. A tablet is propped up in the foreground, displaying a 3D animated avatar of a woman with red hair. The woman looks back and forth between her task and the tablet. Her facial expressions shift from confused to triumphant as she speaks. The camera remains static in a medium close-up shot. The lighting casts soft shadows on her face, emphasizing the casual, late-night setting.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman interacting with a language learning app on her tablet while cutting an apple. The room is lit with a cool blue light. Text overlays appear on the screen, showing the dialogue in white and purple bubbles. A banner of US flags is strung across the top of the frame. The tablet shows a 3D animated avatar that moves as it speaks. The overall composition blends the live-action human with the digital interface and text elements.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Do you speak English?
Character A says: Uh, Tarzan style.
Character B says: Can you at least say your name?
Character A says: My name is Jenny.
Character B says: Nice. Where are you from?
Character A says: I am France.
Character B says: You said I am France. Close though! Try: I am from France.
Character A says: Okay, I am from France. I am France... no... wait, I am from France.
Character B says: There you go!

scenes.setting: Dimly lit room with blue ambient lighting. A desk with a cutting board, an apple, a knife, and a tablet.

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman continues to sit at the desk, pausing her apple-slicing to focus on the tablet. She looks directly at the screen, her expressions changing from skeptical to pleasantly surprised. She gestures slightly with her hands, still holding the knife. The tablet in the foreground continues to display the animated red-haired avatar. The cool blue lighting remains consistent throughout the shot. The camera maintains its static medium close-up framing. The background remains out of focus, keeping the attention on her interaction with the device.

scenes.visual_description: The woman continues her conversation with the AI avatar on the tablet. She stops cutting the apple to focus more on the conversation, looking surprised and then convinced. Text overlays continue to display the dialogue dynamically as it is spoken. The US flag banner remains visible at the top of the screen. The tablet interface remains prominent in the foreground. The composite shot effectively highlights the user's positive reaction to the app's features.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hey Skye, how am I going to improve my English?
Character B says: Daily conversation practice is a must.
Character A says: But who am I going to speak with this bad English?
Character B says: With me, of course!
Character A says: With you?
Character B says: Haven't you heard of AI English teachers? You can make as many mistakes as you want without boring anyone.
Character A says: Wait, that could actually work. You just taught me something in two seconds.
Character B says: We're nothing like those pointless word-matching apps. Download Praktika and see the difference.
Character A says: Well, you know what, fair enough. I'm downloading Praktika right now! Let's go.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid light purple background fills the frame. The color is uniform and flat, with no gradients or textures. There are no characters, props, or environmental elements present. The lighting appears even and shadowless across the entire surface. The composition is entirely empty, serving as a blank canvas. The camera framing is a static wide shot.

scenes.visual_description: A solid light purple background serves as the base for the end card. The Praktika app logo, featuring a stylized white 'C' on a purple square, is centered on the screen. Below the logo, standard download badges for the App Store and Google Play are displayed. The layout is clean and minimal, directing the viewer to download the application. The text 'Praktika' is written in bold black letters below the logo icon. The overall design is simple and standard for mobile app advertisements. This final shot acts as a clear call to action for the audience.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Praktika
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
